\tzpentry{ID4363}{Quadrupole Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4363 introduces Quadrupole Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{B}_{\text{quadrupole}}(\vec{r}) = \lim_{\epsilon \to 0^+} \left[\mathcal{B}_{\text{dipole}}^{(1)}(\vec{r}) + \mathcal{B}_{\text{dipole}}^{(2)}(\vec{r}) + \mathcal{O}(\epsilon^{-4})\right] \end{equation}
